memoryArtifacts.headline: Gertrude de Hohenberg (1225-1281)
memoryArtifacts.description: Gertrude de Hohenberg, née en 1225 et morte le 16 février 1281 à Vienne, est une comtesse de Habsbourg et reine consort de Germanie ; elle est la première épouse de l’empereur Rodolphe Ier de Habsbour …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg於1230年1月24日出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 姆尼澤-藍德迪倫努爾多福史瓦本時，她的父親Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf30歲，母親Mechthild von Tübingen35歲。她於1251年與Rudolf I von Habsburg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1281年2月16日在奧地利維恩享年51歲，埋葬在奧地利亞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg于1230年1月24日出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 姆尼澤-藍德迪倫努爾多福史瓦本时，她的父亲Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf30岁，母亲Mechthild von Tübingen35岁。她于1251年与Rudolf I von Habsburg结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1281年2月16日在奥地利維恩享年51岁，埋葬在奥地利亞特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg was born on 24 January 1230, in Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Saxony, Germany, her father, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, was 30 and her mother, Mechthild von Tübingen, was 35. She married Rudolf I von Habsburg in 1251. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 16 February 1281, in Vienna, Austria, at the age of 51, and was buried in Carinthia, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg est née le 24 janvier 1230, à Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Tübingen, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Rudolf I von Habsburg en 1251. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1281, à Vienne, Autriche, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Kärnten, Autriche.

de.Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitz: Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg am 24. Januar 1230 in Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf 30 und ihre Mutter Mechthild von Tübingen 35. Sie hat 1251 Rudolf I von Habsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Februar 1281 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wien, Österreich und wurde in Kärnten, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg è nata il il 24 gennaio 1230 nel Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mechthild von Tübingen, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Rudolf I von Habsburg nel 1251. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1281, nel Wien, Austria, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Carinzia, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud Anna von Hohenbergが1230年1月24日にドイツサチセンクレイス ケムニツェール-ランドドuレヌhルスドルフスチワベンで生まれた時，父Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Grafは30歳，母Mechthild von Tübingenは35歳であった。1251年にRudolf I von Habsburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1281年2月16日にオーストリアウィンで51歳で死去し，オーストリアクaルンテンにて埋葬された。

ko.Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitz: 독일 작센 크레이스 체니츠-랜드 드u렌울즈도르프 슈와벤
ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg(이)가 1230년 1월 24일 독일 작센 크레이스 체니츠-랜드 드u렌울즈도르프 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechthild von Tübingen(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1251년 Rudolf I von Habsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 2월 16일 오스트리아 빈에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 ka른텐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg nasceu em 24 de janeiro de 1230, em Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Tübingen, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Rudolf I von Habsburg em 1251. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1281, em Wien, Áustria, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Kärnten, Áustria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg родилась 24 января 1230 г. в местности щвабен, дuрренухлсдорф, крис чемницир-ланд, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Tübingen, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rudolf I von Habsburg в 1251 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 16 февраля 1281 г. в местности Вена, Австрия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности кaрнтен, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg nació el 24 de enero de 1230, en Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Tübingen, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Rudolf I von Habsburg en 1251. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1281, en Wien, Austria, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Kärnten, Austria.
